description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, geometric design with a stacked, slatted wood construction. The exterior is composed of horizontal wooden slats, creating a series of evenly spaced gaps that give the piece a visually striking, ventilated appearance. The sides reveal a grid of square cutouts, adding to the contemporary aesthetic and allowing glimpses of the interior structure. The top surface is flat and solid, suitable for placing objects, while the overall finish is a natural, light wood grain. There are no visible handles or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist, utilitarian style. The drawers are subtly integrated, with the slats themselves forming the drawer fronts.
description: A modern, slatted wooden chest of drawers with a grid-like pattern and minimalist design. The light wood finish and absence of visible handles give it a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing five horizontal slatted drawer fronts with no visible handles or decorations.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a grid of square cutouts and the layered construction of the slats.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with horizontal slats and no visible openings or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the grid of square cutouts and the stacked slat design.
